overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character exploring the Arcane University in Imperial City at night. The character walks through a cobblestone courtyard illuminated by purple magical flames, passes a central stone shrine, ascends a grand staircase, and approaches a large gothic building entrance with an eye-symbol mosaic.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined cobblestone path with magical lighting

agents.ego_description: character walks away from a purple magical flame down a cobblestone path lined with trees and stone walls

entered.detail: stone pedestal emitting purple magical fire
tall gray stone wall with vertical ridges
dark leafy trees lining both sides of the path
irregular stone paving stones forming the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a hooded character standing near a purple magical flame. The character walks forward along a narrow cobblestone path flanked by stone walls and trees, moving away from the initial flame into the darker garden area.

events.description: character approaches and passes the central stone shrine structure

agents.ego_description: walking past the central stone shrine and continuing toward the university building

entered.detail: circular stone structure with columns and a small fire at its base

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a central stone shrine with a small fire burning at its base, then continues past it. The path opens slightly as the character moves deeper into the courtyard, with the initial purple flame disappearing behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: arcane university approach with multiple magical braziers

events.description: text overlay appears reading 'Imperial City, The Arcane University'

agents.ego_description: walking toward the main building entrance past multiple purple magical flames

entered.detail: multiple stone pedestals with purple flames illuminating the path
wide stone staircase leading up to the building entrance
large gothic stone structure with tall columns and red banners

segments.scene_description: The environment brightens with multiple purple magical flames lining the path. On-screen text identifies the location as the Arcane University. The character walks toward a grand staircase leading to the main university building, which becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to university entrance

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs flanked by wall sconces toward the building entrance

entered.detail: warm orange torch lights mounted on the stone walls flanking the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character begins climbing a wide stone staircase toward the university entrance. The ground transitions from cobblestones to smooth stone tiles. Warm wall sconces replace the purple flames as the primary light source, and the main building looms larger as the character ascends.

scene_state.functional_zone: university entrance plaza with mosaic seal

events.description: camera pans down to focus on the circular mosaic on the ground

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance and examining the circular mosaic on the ground featuring an eye symbol

entered.detail: large circular stone inlay with golden eye symbol and blue triangular patterns
tall dark wooden double doors with metal studs at the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and approaches the university entrance. The camera focuses on an intricate circular mosaic on the ground depicting a large eye symbol, then looks up at the imposing wooden doors of the Arcane University.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a mystical courtyard that transforms from a dim, magical garden into the imposing entrance of a grand university. It begins with a hooded character walking away from a purple magical flame along a narrow cobblestone path flanked by stone walls and trees. As the character passes a central stone shrine with a small fire, the path opens into a wider courtyard where multiple purple flames illuminate the way toward the Arcane University. The scene then shifts as the character ascends a wide stone staircase, where the ground transitions to smooth tiles and the purple glow is replaced by the warm light of wall sconces. Finally, the camera reaches the top of the stairs to reveal an intricate circular eye mosaic on the ground before tilting up toward the imposing wooden doors of the university.
